title: vault: module doc missing token expiry / VAULT_TOKEN lifecycle notes
description: The vault backend module doc only says 'VAULT_TOKEN must be set'. GCP's module doc has excellent documentation of token expiry, what happens when it expires (401 → Unavailable), and how to rotate (construct a new backend). Vault should have the same. VAULT_TOKEN also expires (default 32 days for root, configurable for others), and the current backend will return Unavailable until re-constructed with a fresh token.
